name: patchquest
description: A local, agent-guided course tracker with a browser UI, SQLite progress, and MCP.

scripts.verify: bun test && bun build ./src/server.ts --target=bun --outdir=/private/tmp/patchquest-build && bun build ./src/mcp.ts --target=bun --outdir=/private/tmp/patchquest-build && bun build ./src/seed.ts --target=bun --outdir=/private/tmp/patchquest-build && bun build ./src/integrations.ts --target=bun --outdir=/private/tmp/patchquest-build && bun build ./public/app.js --target=browser --outdir=/private/tmp/patchquest-build
